login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your editorial workspace.
login.taglineSubtitle: An AI-native editorial platform for structured, citation-worthy publishing. Every story, every voice — in motion.

settings.title: Settings
settings.postLanguageDescription: Choose the language your AI-generated blog posts will be written in.

webhook.title: Publishing webhook
webhook.description: Configure a webhook so published posts are automatically pushed to your website. Your site needs an endpoint that accepts POST requests with the post content.
webhook.autoPublishDescription: When enabled, posts will be pushed to your website immediately when the admin clicks publish.
webhook.autoPublishOn: Posts are pushed to your website immediately on publish
webhook.autoPublishOff: Admin will be asked to confirm before pushing to your website
webhook.noWebhookConfigured: No publish webhook has been configured for your account yet. Contact your manager to set it up.
webhook.lastAutoRunFailedHint: The next scheduled run will try again. If it keeps failing, contact your manager with the error above.

brand.title: Brand
brand.description: Update your company name, logo, colours and voice. Changes are used when generating content.

blogAuthors.extraSectionHint: Each new post picks one author at random from your default profile above plus anyone listed here.

brandAssets.title: Cover references & guidelines
brandAssets.description: Upload up to three images (JPEG, PNG, or WebP; up to 120 MB each) as style references for AI covers. Add brand guidelines (PDF or text, up to 120 MB) so banners follow your rules.
brandAssets.guidelinesHint: PDF, TXT, or Markdown (up to 120 MB). Text is extracted and applied when generating cover images.

brand.title: Set up your brand
brand.subtitle: Tell us about your brand so we can create content that matches your identity.
brand.logoHint: PNG, JPG or SVG up to 2MB
brand.guidelinesHint: Upload a PDF, TXT, or Markdown file (up to 120 MB) to pre-fill the box, then edit the text. Or write guidelines by hand.
brand.guidelinesPlaceholder: e.g. colours, typography, illustration style, words to use or avoid on banners…
brand.guidelinesExtractError: Could not read that file. Use PDF, TXT, or Markdown.
brand.errorDomainTaken: This domain is already linked to another account. Please contact support if you believe this is a mistake.

domain.title: Set up your workspace
domain.subtitle: Enter the domain of the website you want to manage content for.
domain.label: Your website domain
domain.hint: Enter just the domain, without https://
domain.errorDomainTaken: This domain is already linked to another account. Please contact support if you believe this is a mistake.

google.title: Connect your Google account
google.subtitle: Grant access to Google Analytics and Search Console so we can track performance and optimise your content.
google.scopeAnalytics: Google Analytics — read your traffic data
google.scopeSearch: Google Search Console — track rankings and indexing
google.finishForAdmin: You're done. An admin will complete your configuration (e.g. webhook for publishing). You can use your dashboard while waiting.
google.privacyNote: We only request read access. You can revoke access at any time.

oauthError.access_denied: You denied access. Please try again.
oauthError.invalid_state: The request expired or was invalid. Please try again.
oauthError.token_exchange: Could not complete the connection. Please try again.
oauthError.db_error: Connection succeeded but could not be saved. Please contact support.
oauthError.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

admin.title: Admin
admin.dashboardWelcome: Welcome to the admin dashboard. Use the sidebar to manage content.
admin.homeSubtitle: Latest activity across all client accounts, with quick stats and shortcuts below.
admin.recentPostsEmpty: No posts in the system yet
admin.recentPostsEmptyHint: Posts will show up here when clients generate content or publish.
admin.webhookMissingWarning: Webhook missing for the following user(s). Set the webhook in Users to complete their configuration.
admin.reviewOpenQueue: Open the review queue to approve or reject them
admin.author: Author
admin.title: Title

postsPage.noPosts: No posts yet. Create one to get started.
postsPage.confirmDeletePost: This will permanently delete "{slug}" and all locale versions from the CMS.
postsPage.confirmDeleteSelected: This will permanently delete {count} post(s) and all locale versions from the CMS. This cannot be undone.

usersPage.title: User accounts
usersPage.subtitle: Create and manage client accounts. Users cannot create accounts themselves.
usersPage.emptyHint: Create the first client account above.
usersPage.confirmDelete: Delete account for {email}? This cannot be undone.
usersPage.dueNowHint: {count} client(s) due for a post. Use Run scheduler in the sidebar or Generate post on a user to generate now.
usersPage.instructionsDescription: This text is combined with the general instructions when generating posts for this user. Edit to customize brand, voice, and cover guidelines.
usersPage.instructionsPlaceholder: Instructions will be generated from brand data when you click Create instructions.
usersPage.clientSpecificInstructionsDescription: Generated from onboarding and brand data. Use this block for brand voice, visual rules, and account constraints — not for editorial style experiments.
usersPage.clientSpecificInstructionsEmptyHint: Use “Create instructions” above to generate this block from brand data. You can still add optional editorial reinforcement below before this exists.
usersPage.instructionReinforcementDescription: This is not brand identity. Add optional guidance on tone, narrative, structure, and audience (human-first, opinion-led, scannable rhythm, plain language). It is appended to the client-specific instructions above on every generation.
usersPage.reinforcementPlaceholder: Example: Open with the reader’s pain; short paragraphs; one takeaway per section; avoid cold corporate tone; prefer relatable examples over jargon; punchy subheads…

configAssets.brandingHint: Upload a logo file or brand guidelines document, or keep using the URL fields above.
configAssets.guidelinesHint: PDF, TXT, or Markdown (up to 120 MB) — text is extracted for AI cover generation.
configAssets.referenceHint: Up to three images (JPEG, PNG, WebP; up to 120 MB each) used as style references when generating blog covers.
configAssets.guidelinesUploadSaved: Guidelines uploaded and saved. Extracted text appears above when available.

blogAuthors.authorSectionIntro: These names are used as bylines on posts. When a post is created, one author is picked at random from this list. Save configuration at the bottom of this page to apply edits to the first row.
blogAuthors.noExtraAuthors: Add more rows to rotate between several bylines.
blogAuthors.profileSaveHint: Save configuration at the bottom of this page to apply changes to this author.
blogAuthors.confirmDelete: Remove author "{name}"? Published posts keep their current byline.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.postsPageSubtitle: View and manage your posts, or write a new one manually.
dashboard.settingsPageSubtitle: Domain, brand, webhooks, posting schedule, your profile, and extra blog authors.
dashboard.overviewSubtitle: Your latest activity and a snapshot of your content.
dashboard.overviewPostsCta: Open your posts list and editor
dashboard.noRecentPostsHint: Create a manual post or wait for the next scheduled generation.
dashboard.settingsLoadError: Could not load your settings. Try refreshing the page.
dashboard.postsEmptyManualHint: Posts can be generated automatically — or create one manually.
dashboard.manualPostDescription: Create a post yourself — no AI involved. You can add a cover image and edit SEO details after saving.
dashboard.adminSubtitle: You're viewing all posts from all users.
dashboard.waitingForAdmin: Waiting for admin to finish configuration. You can use your dashboard; an admin will set up the webhook for publishing.
dashboard.adminSectionDescription: You have admin rights. Use the links below to manage content and settings.
dashboard.userSectionDescription: You're signed in. Here are some useful links.
dashboard.postsAutoCreated: Posts will be created automatically by the system.
dashboard.author: Author
dashboard.confirmDelete: Delete post "{slug}"? This cannot be undone.

blogAuthors.title: Blog authors
blogAuthors.subtitle: Personas used as bylines on generated posts.
blogAuthors.intro: Authors in the list below are used as bylines. Each time the scheduler creates a post, one is chosen at random. Your profile appears as the first row; edit it in Settings.
blogAuthors.avatarUrlOrUpload: Paste a URL or upload an image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF, max 4MB).
blogAuthors.noExtraAuthors: Add authors here to rotate between several bylines.
blogAuthors.confirmDelete: Remove author "{name}"? Published posts keep their existing byline.

errors.noSession: Sign-in succeeded but no session was created. Try again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Check that NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are set for this environment.

checklist.credibility: At least 1 external citation or expert quote
